title: agrostis heterolepis
intro: Agrostis heterolepis, also known as prairie bentgrass, is a species of grass that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of prairie bentgrass include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Prairie bentgrass is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be made into a salve or poultice for topical application.
